across.clue: A method of doing something using a special skill that you have developed.
An experiment is a test that you do to see what will happen.
To injure someone means to damage a part of their body.
To celebrate is to do something to show that an event is special.
all the things that are present in a place and that form the experience of being there.
Existing done or used for only a limited period of time.
If someone is aware, they know that something or a situation exists.
To advance is to go forward.
To notice something is to see it for the first time.

down.clue: A puzzle is something that is hard to understand.
Excitement is a feeling of great enthusiasm and eagerness.
A level is a point on a scale that measures something.
money that a person or institution such as a bank charges you for lending you money.
If you totally agree, you agree with everything just said.
someone who is walking especially in a town or city instead of driving or riding.
Ashamed means feeling upset and embarrassed because of a bad action.
To contribute to something means to do something to make it successful.
To get rid of something that you no longer want, for example by putting it in a dustbin. | ___ out
To embarrass people is to make them feel ashamed or foolish.
An agent is a person who works for a company or another person.
